arts.ttl: Chelsea transfer decision: Jules Kounde 'informs' Barcelona of contract intentions
arts.sum: Barcelona defender Jules Kounde reportedly takes a specific stance regarding contract negotiations amid alleged interest from Chelsea.

arts.ttl: Ferran is flying! Barca star more efficient that Lewy & Mbappe
arts.sum: Ferran also bosts a shot accuracy of 54% right now in La Liga that’s also incredibly impressive. Ferran Torres was on target for Barcelona once again on Sunday as Hansi Flick’s side ran out 4-1 winners over Girona.

arts.ttl: Barcelona set to make Jonathan Tah call imminently
arts.sum: Barcelona have made it a habit to pursue some of the best free agents on the market in recent years as their financial situation took its toll, with the likes of Eric Garcia, Ilkay Gundogan and Andreas Christensen all arriving on a free from the Premier League. In recent months it has looked as if […] The post Barcelona set to make Jonathan Tah call imminently appeared first on Football España.

arts.ttl: Antoine Griezmann surpasses Lionel Messi and writes his name in La Liga’s history books
arts.sum: Antoine Griezmann (34) may be on his way out at Atlético Madrid, but he continues to make his mark in the Spanish capital. On Saturday, the Frenchman from Mâcon played…

arts.ttl: 'Star': Coach says teenage talent Man Utd just missed out on is the new Lamine Yamal

arts.sum: The Copa del Rey is down to the last four teams and FC Barcelona and Atlético Madrid are aiming for a spot in the grand final on 26 April. Barça receive Osasuna's appeal regarding the 'Iñígo Martínez case' - Mundo Deportivo

arts.ttl: Barcelona transfer news: Hansi Flick's side 'clarify' transfer stance on €100m Man City-linked midfielder
arts.sum: Barcelona have no interest in selling one of their star players to Manchester City amid reports of the Citizens preparing a €100m summer bid.

arts.ttl: Verdict on Gallagher’s season with Simeone’s Atletico Madrid
arts.sum: You may have seen the footage. Conor Gallagher, on as a substitute, tears into one tackle during stoppage-time then launches into a second. Diego Simeone roars his approval from the dugout. The Estadio Metropolitano erupts, the response visceral.

arts.ttl: Lionel Messi leads ex-Barcelona boys at David Beckham's 50th birthday celebrations - as Inter Miami WAGs strike a pose alongside Victoria at swanky party
arts.sum: Lionel Messi and his Inter Miami team-mates were seen enjoying the festivities at David Beckham's early birthday celebrations on Monday.

arts.ttl: Pedri plays down Ballon d’Or talk, suggests Raphinha or Yamal should win
arts.sum: There are some who say he is the best midfielder in the world, and some who go a step further and say he should win the Ballon d’Or. Raphina in particular has been touted as a potential Ballon d’Or winner due to his impressive stats in the UEFA Champions League and in big games.
